Central Valley Bulk Materials, Inc. is a family-owned and operated business that serves nurseries, major landscapers, and special projects throughout California. CVBM, Inc. specializes in supplying high quality bark and mulch to a diverse customer base throughout California.

With over 25 years of experience, Seth Chastain and his team are committed to providing top-quality materials with fast, reliable service at a fair price.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_blurb title="Timeliness" image_icon_background_color="#F3B007" image="https://centralvalleybulkmaterials.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/time-management_7472257-1.png" image_icon_width="84px" icon_alignment="left" content_max_width_tablet="1100px" content_max_width_phone="1100px" content_max_width_last_edited="on|tablet" module_class="about-us-blurb" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" header_level="h2" header_font="|600|||||||" header_text_color="#0A0A0A" header_font_size="32px" body_text_color="#1A1A1A" background_color="#ffffff" image_icon_custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px|true|true" height="100%" custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px|true|true" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="left" animation_intensity_slide="8%" header_font_size_tablet="34px" header_font_size_phone="30px" header_font_size_last_edited="on|desktop" border_radii="on|12px|12px|12px|12px" border_color_all="#F4BD17" border_width_bottom="6px" border_radii_image="on|6px|6px|6px|6px" box_shadow_style="preset2" box_shadow_blur="12px" box_shadow_color="rgba(204,204,204,0.71)" global_colors_info="{}" border_width_bottom__hover="5px" border_width_bottom__hover_enabled="on|hover" border_color_bottom__hover="#F2A413" border_color_bottom__hover_enabled="on|hover"]

CVBM, Inc. will work with our customers to identify the best product for their needs and ensure materials are delivered on time. We are available 7 days a week by phone or email so you can trust that we will be available for last minute or emergency orders.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
